name: last9
description: Last9 observability skills for Codex. Query logs and traces through the hosted Last9 MCP server with service-first narrowing and verified query guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Debug Last9 logs and traces from Codex using the hosted MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Last9 packages Codex skills for production debugging workflows on top of the hosted Last9 MCP server. Use last9-logs for log-first investigation and logjson query guardrails; use last9-traces for trace-first investigation and tracejson query guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use last9-logs to investigate log errors
Use last9-traces to diagnose a slow service
